title: MBM Intellectual Property Law ransomware incident

extortion.description: MBM is an Intellectual Property (IP) law firm with offices across Canada. MBM's professionals are dedicated solely to IP law, including staff that holds Ph.Ds in a multitude of disciplines including: molecular biology, clinical & organic chemistry, neuroscience, electrical, mechanical and software engineering fields, in addition to highly experienced IP litigators. Their services include obtaining and enforcing all intellectual property rights (patents, trademarks, industrial designs, copyrights, trade secrets), as well as providing strategic IP advice
